# extendTokenExpires

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the extendTokenExpires mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.extendTokenExpires({ input: { amount: '<IntervalInput>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run extendTokenExpires

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.extendTokenExpires({ input: { amount: '<IntervalInput>' } }).execute();
```
